name: agent-toolkit
description: Personal AI agent toolkit installer for Claude Code, Codex CLI, OpenCode, Gemini CLI and graph-aware workflows.

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run build && find dist/bin dist/src -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check && bash -n setup-agent-toolkit.sh && npm run test:integration
scripts.security: npm run security:audit && npm run security:signatures
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
